title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 11, 2023
summary: May 11 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a slightly higher rate of 2.78% , from the level on 05/04/2023 of 13.414 M km 2 to 13.042 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laborato...
